title: Aalayabeedam Vaarungale Iraimakkale
lyrics:
Aalaya peedam vaarungal iraimakkalae
Aandavan sannidhi saerungal iraikulamae
Manathaangalgalodu alla manamaatrangalodu sella - 2
Samabandhi virundhil sangamippom
1.Vaazhkaiyum vazhipaadum inaindhidavae

Vaarthaiyai vaazhvaai amaithiduvom
Niraivaai peruvadhae arulenbom
Iruppadhai pagirvdhae samamenbom
Nalvaazhvae aanmeega vazhipaadu - 2
Indhadh thiruppali adharkor aerpaadu

2.Iraivaarthai neriyae unmai vazhi
Idhayathai thaetrum inba mozhi
Thannaiyae tharugindra thalaivan vazhi
Pagirvil uyarvu kaanum neri - indha
Unmaiyai naalum unandhidavae - 2
Indhadh thiruppali adharkor aerpaadu

title: Aalayathil Naam Nuzhaigayile
lyrics:
Aalayathil naam nuzhaigaiyilae
Pudhu ninaivugal ezhugindrana
Andha ninaivugalin pudhu varugaiyilae
Nam nenjangal niraigindrana aa... (2)
1. Anbaana maganai paligodutha
Aabraham ingae therigindraar (2)
Panbaana aattinai paliyeendha Aabelum ingae therigindraar
2. Erusalaim aalayam nuzhaindavudan
Iesuvum angae mozhindhaarae (2)
En veedu idhu seba veedu vankalvar gugaiyaai maatradheer

title: Aananda Gaanangal Anbudan
lyrics:
Aanandha gaanangal anbudan isaithae
Aandhavar illam selvom (2)
Endrum avaniyil maandhar anbinil milira
Arul vaendi baliyiduvom (2)

1. Urundodum vaazhvil karaindhidum naalai
Olipetruh thigazha varam kaetkirom (2)
Gaanamum kaatrum vaerillaiyae - 2
Neeyindri en vaazhvil vaerillaiyae vaerillaiyae

2. Vidiyalin panithuli midipadavae - um
Vidiyalin kanavai yaam kandidanum (2)
Manadhinai kaakkum maanbudanae (2)
Manangalai baliyida varugindrom varugindrom

title: Aananda Geethangal Muzhangida
lyrics:
Aanandha geethangal muzhangida ezhuvom
Aandhavar aalayam nuzhaindhiduvom (2)
Vaarungal vaarungal vaazhthiduvom (2)
Vaanpugazh innisai isaithiduvom

1. Vidiyalin vaelvigal padaithidavae
Viduthalai vaazhvinai pagirndhidavae (2)
Vaazhthidu iraikulamae vanangidu iraivanaiyae
Pugazhdhidu baliyinilae valarndhidu anbinilae

2. Iraivanai thaedidum uravugalae
Iraivazhi vaazhndhida vaarungalae (2)
Samathuva uravinilae sangamam aagidavae
Urimaigal adaindhidavae uravinil inaindhidavae

title: Aananda Malargalaaga Anbiyam
lyrics:
Aanandha malargalaaga anbiyam malara vaendum
Aaviyin kodaigal anaithum agilathai nirappa vaendum
Maanuda naeyangal mannil malara vaendum (indha) - 2

1. Visuvaasam anbu nambikkai ennum
Kadavulin kodaigalil - adhil
Anbondru mattum iraivanin vazhiyil agilathai aalumae
Vinnavarin anbin arasu
Mannavaril nilaikka vaendum (2)
Punitha boobaalam isaithida innaivom
Vaazhga anbiyam niraivaazhvin kaedayam - 2

Saadhigal maraindhu baedhangal ozhindhu nambikkaiyil nilaithida
Pirar kuraigalai marandhu kutrangalai mannithu
Samathuvam kaanuvom - vinnavarin ... ...

title: Aandavar Avaiyinil Paadungalae
lyrics:
Aandhavar avaiyinil paadungalae nalla
Aanandha geethangalae nalla aanandha geethangalae (2)

1. Idhayangal innoli ezhubbidumae nam
Avayangal arulisai paadidumae (2)
Ninaivinil geethangal suzhandridumae aa... - 2
Anaivarin anbanai vaazhthidavae

2. Manamennum koyilil thoranangal - nam
Magizhchiyai parappidum maniyoligal (2)
Idhayathin ezhuchiyae thoobappugai aa... - 2
Idhayathin anbanai vanangidavae

title: Aandavar Sannithi Varungale
lyrics:
Aandhavar sannidhi vaarungalae nal
Aanandhamudanae paadungalae (2)
Iesuvin ninaivil magizhungalae - 2 indha
Igamadhil naalum muzhangungalae vaarungalae - 4

1. Ullangal magizhum uravugal malarum
Iraivan anbil vaazhndhu vandhaal
Aduthavar nalanil naattamae kondaal
Aandhavar vazhiyinil nadandhidalaam
Kuraigalai kaanaamal pirarai aettral
Iesuvai avaril kandidalaam (2)
Iraippani thodara iraiyaatshi malara
Inaindhiduvom naam iraivanilae (2)

2. Saadhigal illai baedhangal illai
Iraivan iesu varugaiyilae
Needhiyum undu samathuvam undu
Iraivan vaazhum samogathilae
Anbae kadavul enbadhai unandhaal
Iniya ulagam padaithidalaam (2)
Kuzhandhai iesu ullathil pirandhaal
Pudhiya piraviyaai vaazhndhidalaam (2)

title: Aandavarin Thirusannithiyil
lyrics:
Aandhavarin thirusannidhiyil
Aanandhamudanae paaduvomae - 2

1. Magizhvudan avarai aaraadhipom
Mangala geethangal muzhangiduvom (2)
Avarae thaevan endrarivom avarae nammaip padaithaarae

2. Naam avar maeychalin aadugalaam
Naamae avaradhu perumakkalaam (2)
Thudhip pugazhodu nuzhaindhiduvom thooya avaradhu vaasalkalil

3. Thaevanin thiruppeyar potriduvom
Thaevanin nanmaigal saatriduvom (2)
Thaevanin kirubai unmaiyumae
Thalaimurai thalaimurai needikkumae

title: Aandavar Vazhiyil Aayaththam
lyrics:
Aandhavar vazhiyai aayatham seivom
Ahavarin paadhaigalai semmaiyaai aakkuvom (2)
Selluvom - 2 avar vazhiyil naam selluvom (2)

1. Pallathaakkugalaellam niravach seivom
Malaigal kundrugalaellam thaazhthi vaippom (2)
Konalaanavatrai naeraaga aakkuvom - 2
Karadumuradhaanavatrai samamaakki vazhinadappom

2. Manidharallaarum thamadhu meetpaik kaana
Kadavul vandhuvittaar nammaik kanduvittaar (2)
Manam thirumbuvom narcheidhi nambuvom - 2
Vinnarasu nerungi vittadhu nammidai vandhuvittadhu

title: Aandavarae Um Illam
lyrics:
Aandhavarae um illam varugiraen varugiraen - 2
Varugiraen varugiraen un illam thaedi varugiraen
Varugiraen varugiraen un anbaip paadi varugiraen (2)
Aandhavarae un illam varugindraen
Adaikkalam naadi un peedam varugiraen thozhugiraen - 2 (2)
Un vazhi nadandhida sebikka varugiraen
Viyathagu seyalkalai enni viyakkiraen

1. Anbinaip pagirndhida varugiraen
Un arulinil nanaindhida varugiraen
Ulladhai uvappudan tharugiraen
Un oliyinil vaazhndhida vizhaigiraen
Thaayin karuvil enaith thaerndhu kondai
Karangal pididhu enai azhaithu vandhaai
Iraivaa en iraivaa en aadhaaram neeyaagavaa
Imaigal pola enaik kaathu nindraai
Un karathil en peyaraip porithu vaithaai
Irulaip pazhikkaamal oli aetru - en
Idhayam kalangaamal uravaada un oliyinil kalandhiduvaen

2. Naano siruvanendru vilagi nindraen
Aedhum ariyaenendru thayangi nindraen
Iraivaa en iraivaa en nallaayan neeyaaga va
Umadhu vaarthaigalaip paesap panithaai
Umadhu panikku enaith thaerndhu kondai
Kadamai maravaadhu pani seyya en
Kanavu nanavaaga dhinam uzhaikka un uravinil kalandhiduvaen

title: Aaviyilum Endrum Unmaiyilum
lyrics:
Aaviyilum endrum unmaiyilum vazhibada vaarungal
Indha avaniyil iraivan arasinaik kaanum
Aanandham paarungal (2)

1. Ulagin maandhargalae ungal idhayathait thirandhidungal
Iraivaarthaiyin porul kaanungal
Igam vaazhndhidum murai kaelungal

2. Ulagin maandhargalae ungal karangalthait thirandhidungal
Wariyorukku vazhikaattungal valampongida vagaikoorungal

title: Aesuvae Endrum Ennudan
lyrics:
Aesuvae endrum ennudan irundhu
Ennai nadathumaiya
Ennai muzhudhum undhan paadhathil
Arppanam thandhaenaiyaa (2)

1. Kalangaadhae maganae endrazhaithu thahm
Kaikalil ennaith thaangugindraar (2)
Kadavul naan unnarugil kaalamum iruppaen engindraar - 2

2. Valimaiyum thidamum naanaavaen nam
Valakkaram unnaik kaakkum endraar (2)
Edhirigal unnaich choozhndhaalum
En peyar unnai meetkum endraar (2)

title: Aesuvil Inainthida Iraimayil
lyrics:
Aesuvil inaindhida iraimaiyil nanaindhida
Ezhundhingu vaareer iraimakkalae
Anbinil kalandhida arulinil valandhida
Niraivudan vaareer maanidarae
Ezruga ezruga iraimakkalae varuga varuga maanidarae - 2

1. Pudhiyadhor aaviyum pudhiyadhor idhayamum
Peruvanadhu vaazhvin kodaiyandro (2)
Adhai adaiya muyalvadhum amaidhi kaanbadhum
Agilam vaazhum vazhiyandro (2)

2. Uravinil valandhida unmaiyil nilaithida
Tannaiyae thandhavar iraivanandro (2)
Avar arasinaik kaana ondraai inaindhadhum
Pudhuyugam kaanum muraiyandro (2)

title: Aesuvin Sannithiyil Magizhvom
lyrics:
Aesuvin sannidhiyil magizhvom vaarungal
En devanil nam iesuvil inaindhu magizhungal - 2

1. Sandhangal pala vannangal undhan bandhangal dhinam paaduvaen
Ennangal sangeethangal endrum en inba sugaraagangal
Nee seidha nanmaigal en vaazhvin vidiyalgal
Endrendrum naan paaduvaen (2)

2. Kaalangal pala naalulae undhan kanivaana arul thaarumae
Thaagangal ini maarumae endrum en aanma kurai theerumae
En aayut kaalangal un anbil naan vaazha
En illam thangiduvaai (2)

title: Aesuvin Thalaimayil Puthiyathor
lyrics:
Aesuvin thalaimaiyil pudhiyadhor ulagam
Amaithida ezhundhiduvom - nam
Idhayathil ezhundhidum ennangal yaavaiyum
Isaiyudan muzhangiduvom - 2
Iraikulamae ezruga aa iraiyarasae varuga - 2

1. Ezhaihal vaazhum therukkalil irangi
Aesuvae nadandhu sendraar - nam
Iraivanin arasu avargalukkuriya dhu
Enbadhai edhuthuch chonnaar (2) andha
Iraimagan iesuvin paadhangal vazhiyil
Payanathait thodandhiduvom (vaazhkai) - 2

2. Siraigalil vaazhvor vidudhalai adaivar
Endru aesu chonnaar - avar
Odukkappa ttorukkum urimaiyat rorukkum
Vazhanguvaen vaazhvu endraar (2)
Nam vizhigalait thirandhu ulaginaip paarppom
Aaviyin vazhinadappom thooya aaviyin vazhinadappom

title: Amaithi Thaedi Alaiyum
lyrics:
Amaidhi thaedi alaiyum nenjamae
Anaithum ingu avaril thanjamae (2)
Nilaiyaana sondham neengaadha bandham - 2
Avarandri vaerillaiyae

1. Potruvaen en thaevanai paraichatruvaen en naadhanai
Ennaalumae en vaazhvilae (2)
Kaadumaedu pallam endru kaalgal soorndhu alaindha aadu
Naadudhae adhu thaedudhae (2)

2. Iraivanae en idhayamae indha
Iyarkaiyin nal iyakamae
En thaevanae en thalaivanae (2)
Parandhu virindha ulagam padaithu sirandha padaippaai
Ennaik kanda thaevanae en jeevanae (2)

title: Anbai Kondaduvom
lyrics:
Anbaik kondaaduvom irai anbil ondraaguvom
Indha ulagil manidhanalam malarndhu maanbadaiya
Panbodu naam vaazhuvom niraivaazhvai naam kaanuvom (2)

1. Pagaimai unarvugalai naam kalaindhu
Paasathait pozhindhae vaazhuvom (2)
Vaetrumai nilaigalai madhithinghu
Otrumaiyudanae pazhaguvom
Anbirku ilakkanamaagidavae
Andraadam uravugal valarndhidavae
Ondru saervom uravil inaivom
Iraivan virumbum ulagam padaippom

2. Paagubaadugalai naam veruthu
Pagirvilae samathuvam kaanuvom (2)
Pilavugal pinakkugal oyndhingu
Piraraiyum naesikkath thuvanguvom
Ullangal ondraaga inaindhidavae
Ulagellaam niraiyanbu thulangidavae - ondru saervom

title: Anbin Thirukkulame
lyrics:
Anbin thirukkulamae irai Aesuvin ariyanaiyae
Ezhuvom oru manadhaai koodith thozhuvom pugazhp baliyaai (2)
Iraikulamae ezhuvom iraiyarasai amaippom
Maraiyudalaai varuvom thiruppaliyil inaivom (2)

1. Irulin aatchiyai muriyadikka
Andru nigazhndha baliyai ninaippom
Iraivan maindhanae balipporulaai
Thannai izhandha thiyaagam uraippom (2)
Suyanalam maraiya samathuvam malara
Anbu parivu konda iraikulam valarppom

2. Iraivan vaarthaiyai edhuthuraikkum - indha
Iniya baliyil inaivom
Uravu virundhinai parimaarum
Thiruvirundhu pagirvil magizhvom (2)
Valimaiyil valara vaanjaiyil thigazha
Vallal iesuvin azhaippinai aerppom

title: Anbin Vizhuthugal Padarnthidavae
lyrics:
Anbin vizhudhugal padarndhidavae
Manidha maanbugal uyirthida
Manach siraiyin kadhavugal udaindhidavae
Irai unarvugal vaazhattum - 2 (2)

1. Vazhibaattil kaanum unarvugal nam
Vaazhvil nadhiyaayp paayattum (2)
Vaedhathil vaazhum panbugal nam
Manadhil vaazhvaai amaiyattum (2)
Pudhiya paadhaiyil thodarndhu pudhuyugam naam padaippom - 2
Ini varum naalil pudhu vaazhvil iraiinbam kaanbom

2. Vaarthaigal paesum unmaigal nam
Idhayathil uyiraai vaazhattum (2)
Urimaiyil pootha uravugal pudhuk
Kavidhaigal paadi magizhattum - pudhiya paadhaiyil

title: Anbinil Pirantha Iraikkulam
lyrics:
Anbinil pirandha iraikulam naamae
Anbinhaik kaathu aram valarppoomae - 2

1. Oru manadhooraai anaivarum vaazhvom
Aruloli veesum oru vazhi povom (2)
Pirivinai maaythu thirumarai kaappom - 2
Parivulla iraivan thiruvolam kaanbom

2. Pirappilum iesu irappilum iesu
Perumai seidhaarae punidhap paeranbai (2)
Pirandha nam vaazhvin payanpera vaendum - 2
Piraraiyum namaip pol ninaithida vaendum

title: Anbinil Pirantha
lyrics:
Anbinil pirandha iraikulam naamae
Anbinhaik kaathu aram valarppoomae - 2

1. Oru manadhooraai anaivarum vaazhvom
Aruloli veesum oru vazhi povom (2)
Pirivinai maaythu thirumarai kaappom - 2
Parivulla iraivan thiruvolam kaanbom

2. Pirappilum iesu irappilum iesu
Perumai seidhaarae punidhap paeranbai (2)
Pirandha nam vaazhvin payanpera vaendum - 2
Piraraiyum namaip pol ninaithida vaendum

title: Anbu Maanthar Anaivarumae
lyrics:
Anbu maandhar anaivarumae vaarungal
Iraivan azhaippai aetru avaril magizhungal iraiyarasin

1. Iesuvil naamum vaazhndhida vaendum
Avarin paadhaiyilae naam nadandhidada vaendum (2)
Paavam pokkida vaendum kobam neekkida vaendum
Endrum - aduthavarai anbu seyya vaendum - 2

2. Aaviyin varangal naam pera vaendum
Avarin aatralodu panipuriya vaendum (2)
Manidham malarndhida vaendum punidham adaindhida vaendum
Adhanaal - idaividaadhu naam sebikka vaendum - 2

title: Ani Aniyaai Vaarungal
lyrics:
Ani aniyaai vaarungal anbu maandharae
Aandhavar iesuvin saatchi neengalae (2)

1. Anbuppaniyaalae ulagai vellungal
Inba thunbam edhaiyum thaangidungal (2)
Eliyavar vaazhvil thunainindru
Iesuvin saatchiyaai nilaithirungal (2)

2. Mannagathil porulais saerkka vaendaam
Maraindhu ozhindhu poividumae (2)
Vinnil porulai dhinam saerthu
Iesuvin saatchiyaai nilaithirungal (2)

title: Archchanai Malarai Aalayaththil
lyrics:
Archanai malaraaga aalayathil varugindrom
Aanandhamai pugazh geetham endrum paaduvom (2)
Arppanithu vaazhndhida anbar ummil valarndhida
Aasaiyodu arul vaendip panigindrom (2)

1. Thaayin karuvilae uruvaagum munnarae
Arindhu engalait thaerndha dheivamae
Paaviyaayinum pachach pillaiyaayinum
Archithirukkindreer karpithirukkindreer
Manidharaagap punidharaaga vaazhap panikkindreer
Pirarum vaazha engal vaazhvaik kodukka azhaikkindreer
Anjaadhae endru emmaik kaathu varugindreer

2. Umadhu vaarthaiyai engal vaayil oottineer
Umadhu paadhaiyai engal paadhaiyaakkineer
Umadhu maatchiyai emmil thulangach seigindreer
Umadhu saatchiyaai naangal vilangach solkindreer
Azhithu ozhikkak kavizhthu veezhthath thittam theettineer
Katti ezhuppa nattu vaikka emmai anuppineer
Anjaadhae endru emmaik kaathu varugindreer

title: Arputha Anbarin Adi Thozhavae
lyrics:
Arbudha anbanin adithozhavae
Avarin paadham ani thiralvom
Ithanai igam vaazh uyirgalumae
Iesuuvai vanangidumae (2)

1. Aalayamaniyin oosaiyaik kaetpom
Aayanae nammaik kooppidak kaetpom (2)
Aaviyin arulaal aravazhi nadappom
Avarin vaarthaiyai vaazhvinil aerppom (2)
Anbinil inaivom arulil nilaipom
Aanandhamai vaazhvom (naam) - (2)

2. Aalayak kadhavu thirandhidap paarthom
Aandhavan sannidhi vanangiyae nindrom (2)
Anbuk karangal kooppiyae thozhuvom
Avarin arulaal aarudhal adaivom (2) anbinil

title: Arutkaram Thaedi Un
lyrics:
Arutkaram thaedi un aalaya peedam
Alai alaiyaaga varugindrom
Aruviyaai vazhiyum un arulinil nanaiya
Aanandhamaaga varugindrom (2)

1. Aayiram aayiram aasaigalaal
Aadidum oodamaai em vaazhkai (2)
Moozhgidum vaelaiyil em thalaivaa
Um karamdhaanae emmaik karaisaerkkum
Perum puyalo ezhum alaiyo
Nidham varumo oli irukka (2)
Naalumae emmaik kaathidum undhan

2. Aarudhal thaedum idhayangalo
Anbinaith thaedi alaigindradhu (2)
Thaetrida viraiyum em thalaivaa - um
Dheiveegak karamdhaanae emaith thaetrum
Kodum piniyo varum pirivo
Thuyar tharumo thunai irukka (2)
Naalumae anbaayk kaathidum undhan

title: Azhaikkirar Yesu Aandavar
lyrics:
Azhaikkiraar yesu aandhavar
Aavalaai naam selluvom (2)
Avar baliyinil kalandhida avar oliyinil nadandhida - 2
Saatchigalaai endrum vaazhndhida innaalilae

1. Thaediyae thaevan varugiraar thannaiyae naalum tharugiraar
Thoolgalil nammaith thaanguvaar thuyarinil avar thaetruvaar
Sumaigalai sugangalaaga maatruvaar
Valamudan vaazhum vazhiyaik kaattuvaar (2)
Vaarungal oorudalaai inaindhiduvom
Vaanagath thandhaiyai naam vanangiduvom

2. Anbinaal ulagai aaluvaar aaviyaal nammai nirappuvaar
Amaidhiyai endrum aruluvaar aanandham nenjil pozhiguvaar
Vidiyalin geethamaaga muzhanguvaar
Vidudhalai vaazhvai namakku vazhanguvaar (2) vaarungal

title: Azhaikkum Iraivan Kuralai Kaettu
lyrics:
Azhaikkum iraivan kuralaikkaettu ezhundhu vaarungal
Anaithum avarin sangamamaaga viraindhu vaarungal (2)
Bali seluthidavae balan adaindhidavae - 2
Padaitha thaevan pugazh parappap panindhu vaarungal

1. Paadhai kaattum aayanaaga iraivan azhaikkindraar
Paavam neekki paasam kaatta thaevan azhaikkindraar (2)
Anbin aatchiyae avarin maatchiyae - 2
Padaitha thaevan pugazh parappap panindhu vaarungal

2. Vaazhvu vazhangum vaarthaiyaaga vaazha azhaikkindraar
Vaari vazhangum vallalaaga paraman azhaikkindraar (2)
Niraindha vaazhvilae nammai nirappavae - 2
Iniya thaevan nammai azhaikka inaindhu vaarungal

title: Chinna Chinna Pookkal
lyrics:
Chinna chinna pookkal sirikkudhu
Engum singaaramaai vandhu paadudhu (2)
Enna ninaithu indha inba alaiyo - 2
Mannan indru vandha iravil

1. Nenjil unakkoor idam thandhu rasippaen
Poobaalam unakkaai naam paaduvaen (2)
Endhan vizhi vaasalilae naan unakkaai kaathiruppaen (2)
En vaazhvin selvam neeyaaguvaai
Indha ezhaiyin kanavum neeyaaguvaai
Mannan indru vandha iravil

2. Undhan varavaal manam pongi magizhum
Oyaadha thunbangal enai neengidum (2)
Nilaiyaana en sondhamae manam niraivaana en bandhamae (2)
En manak koottaiyil poovaaguvaai
En vaazhvu malarndhida vazhiyaaguvaai
Mannan indru vandha iravil

title: Deva Un Thiruvadiyai
lyrics:
Dhaevaa un thiruvadiyai endrendrum naan thaeduvaen
Naadhaa un sannidhiyai dhinandhoorum naan naaduvaen (2)
Sugamaana ninaivaalae suramaana sollaalae - 2
Nidham undhan padham thaeduvaen - un
Arulaalae uyir vaazhuvaen

1. Irulaana ulagathilae nee oliyaaga varavaendumae - 2
Thadumaari thavaraaga naan vaazhumboodhu
Vazhikaatti enaik kaakka vaa enakkaaga uyir vaazhbavaa
Oliyaaga vazhiyaaga uyiraaga vandhu
Enakkaaga uyir neethavaa - kalvaari baliyaanavaa

2. Nilaiyillaa ulagathilae nee nilai vaazhvu tharavaendumae - 2
Poyyaana sugam thaedi naan vaazhumboodhu
Meignaana sudar aanavaa irulneekki arul aanavaa
Uyiraaga uravaaga niraivaazhvu thandhu
